content: Hello, I was browsing the list of good first issues and I was wondering if there was a priority for these issues or not. Also: contributions are the same as the rest of the Linux kernel right? get-maintainers script and email the patch?

Also: contributions are the same as the rest of the Linux kernel right? get-maintainers script and email the patch?

Yes, rust-for-linux follows the same processes as the rest of the kernel. We originally started out with Github pull requests, but have been using the rust-for-linux mailing list for accepting patches for quite a while now.

I was wondering if there was a priority for these issues or not.

I did say pick something interesting to you that hasn't been claimed by someone else yet. From a quick scan nothing unclaimed looks to be particularly high priority.
Gatlin Newhouse has marked this topic as resolved.
